tasks.label: Home Assistant (pycvp: PyPI latest)
args: pkill -f "^/workspaces/ha_City-Visitor-Parking/.venv/bin/python .*-m homeassistant" || true; sleep 2; pkill -9 -f "^/workspaces/ha_City-Visitor-Parking/.venv/bin/python .*-m homeassistant" || true; rm -f /workspaces/config/.ha_run.lock /workspaces/config/home-assistant.log; uv pip install --python /workspaces/ha_City-Visitor-Parking/.venv/bin/python --upgrade pycityvisitorparking; PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 /workspaces/ha_City-Visitor-Parking/.venv/bin/python -u -m homeassistant --debug -c /workspaces/config 2>&1 | tee -a /workspaces/config/home-assistant.log

tasks.label: Home Assistant (pycvp: local dev)
args: pkill -f "^/workspaces/ha_City-Visitor-Parking/.venv/bin/python .*-m homeassistant" || true; sleep 2; pkill -9 -f "^/workspaces/ha_City-Visitor-Parking/.venv/bin/python .*-m homeassistant" || true; rm -f /workspaces/config/.ha_run.lock /workspaces/config/home-assistant.log; export PYTHONPATH=/workspaces/pyCityVisitorParking/src${PYTHONPATH:+:$PYTHONPATH}; echo "[pycvp local dev] Verifying local package import..."; /workspaces/ha_City-Visitor-Parking/.venv/bin/python -c "import pycityvisitorparking; print(\"[pycvp local dev] Using \" + pycityvisitorparking.__file__)"; PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 /workspaces/ha_City-Visitor-Parking/.venv/bin/python -u -m homeassistant --debug -c /workspaces/config 2>&1 | tee -a /workspaces/config/home-assistant.log

tasks.label: Test: pyCityVisitorParking
args: set -euo pipefail; cd /workspaces/pyCityVisitorParking && uv run pytest

tasks.label: Test: ha_City-Visitor-Parking
args: set -euo pipefail; cd /workspaces/ha_City-Visitor-Parking && UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT=/workspaces/ha_City-Visitor-Parking/.venv uv run pytest

tasks.label: Lint: pyCityVisitorParking
args: set -euo pipefail; cd /workspaces/pyCityVisitorParking && uv run ruff check src && uv run pylint src

tasks.label: Install pycvp (local dev editable)
args: set -euo pipefail; /workspaces/ha_City-Visitor-Parking/.venv/bin/python -m pip uninstall -y pycityvisitorparking || true; uv pip install --python /workspaces/ha_City-Visitor-Parking/.venv/bin/python --editable /workspaces/pyCityVisitorParking

tasks.label: Verify pycvp install
args: set -euo pipefail; /workspaces/ha_City-Visitor-Parking/.venv/bin/python -m pip show pycityvisitorparking; /workspaces/ha_City-Visitor-Parking/.venv/bin/python -c "import pycityvisitorparking; print(pycityvisitorparking.__file__)"; /workspaces/ha_City-Visitor-Parking/.venv/bin/python -c "import pycityvisitorparking.provider.dvsportal.api as m; print(m.__file__)"; /workspaces/ha_City-Visitor-Parking/.venv/bin/python -c "from pycityvisitorparking.provider.dvsportal.const import LOGIN_METHOD_PAS; print(LOGIN_METHOD_PAS)"
